title: med-agent pack manifest
description: Contract every packs/<domain>/pack.yaml must satisfy. The engine reads only this manifest plus the files it points at; domain authors never touch engine/. Extends PLAN §1 with knowledge_injection (reconciles lite sections-only vs advanced yaml-stack), typed oob blocklist (replaces each fork's hardcoded oob_check.sh), output (replaces hardcoded postprocess section/citation checks) and model (replaces hardcoded build_prompt params).

id.description: Domain slug; must equal the pack directory name.

source.description: Provenance metadata for the knowledge base.

features.description: Engine capability switches. Lite packs leave all defaults (everything off / sections-only).

knowledge_injection.description: sections_only (lite ad/neo/sleep/stcc): runtime injects only sections_dir/<domain>.md. yaml_stack (advanced inner-all/psy): runtime additionally stacks per-disease knowledge/<sp>/<disease>.yaml + guidelines + safety_floor.

page_traceable.description: true (textbook packs) enables folio_map / audit_pages and page-citation verification.

ingest.description: manual: cards authored by hand. pdf: engine/tools/ingest.py. markdown: engine/tools/extract_yaml.py + build_sections.py (stcc).

deep_eval.description: true enables eval_deep / verify_claims (claim-level FActScore-style verification + reroll).

output_schema.description: Path (relative to pack root) to the segment-format definition, e.g. prompts/output_schema.md. Per-audience variants resolved as output_schema.md / output_schema_doctor.md.

sections_dir.description: Directory (relative to pack root) of per-category knowledge section prompts.

system_base.description: System prompt path; _doctor variant resolved by suffix when audiences includes doctor.

knowledge.description: Knowledge directory (yaml_stack) OR provenance-only source dir (sections_only). Required when knowledge_injection=yaml_stack.

knowledge_header.default: 以下是与用户问题相关的知识片段，你的回答必须严格基于这些内容：
knowledge_header.description: Lead-in line printed before injected knowledge in the system prompt. Lite forks vary the wording (共识 vs 教材及指南); captured here for prompt parity.

knowledge_section_title.default: # 当前问题相关知识片段
knowledge_section_title.description: Markdown heading above the injected knowledge block. Most forks use the default; stcc uses '# 当前问题相关分诊知识片段'.

map.description: Path to category_index.yaml: keyword-pattern -> domain tag table (replaces hardcoded router.sh).

fallback.description: Default domain tag when no keyword matches and no LLM fallback (e.g. cardiology:general).

llm_fallback.description: true allows zero-shot LLM classification when keyword routing misses.

templates.description: Path to oob_templates.md (rejection copy keyed by gate type). _doctor variant resolved by suffix.

blocklist.description: Ordered, first-match-wins interception rules; replaces each fork's hardcoded oob_check.sh. Each rule emits out_of_scope:<type> when its pattern matches AND its optional unless guard does not.

type.description: OOB category tag; must match a `## <type>` header in oob.templates.

pattern.description: grep -E alternation; if it matches the question this rule fires.

unless.description: Optional guard; if it also matches, the rule is skipped (question stays in_scope). Captures 'comorbidity is in-scope' exclusions.

unless_all.description: Optional AND-guard; the rule is skipped only when EVERY pattern here matches (e.g. neo's 'NEC + infection → in-scope').

output.description: Deterministic postprocess contract (replaces hardcoded postprocess.sh). Keyed by audience plus a shared oob_exempt_pattern.

oob_exempt_pattern.description: If a response matches this, the citation requirement is waived (it is an OOB refusal).

model.description: LLM call parameters (replaces hardcoded build_prompt.sh values).

name.description: Model id, e.g. deepseek-chat or deepseek-v4-flash. Overridable via DEEPSEEK_MODEL env.

crisis_gold.description: Path to an adversarial crisis_gold.yaml (crisis:/in_scope: lists). Triggers the fail-closed crisis gate (engine/crisis_check.py); for safety-critical packs (psy).

baseline.description: Frozen pre-migration scores from the source repo, for the §5 parity gate.

recorded_from.description: source repo path + git commit the baseline was captured at

required_sections.description: Substrings every well-formed answer must contain (grep -F).

citation_pattern.description: grep -E pattern a non-OOB answer must contain (the citation/source marker). Omit to skip the citation check.

citation_requires.description: Optional gate: the citation_pattern is only required when the response also matches this (e.g. stcc requires the 120/急诊 hotline only for A/B-grade triage). Omit → citation always required.
